L0200C_ABNRML_MOUTH_TISUE_CD L0200C Dental Status: Abnormal Mouth Tissue Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has abnormal mouth tissue (ulcers, masses, oral lesions, including under denture or partial if one is worn). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
403 L0200D_CVTY_CD L0200D_CVTY_CD L0200D Dental Status: Cavity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has an obvious or likely cavity or broken natural
